features: Formulated with Salicylic Acid and Niacinamide
Prevent spot picking from pick-happy hands
description: Product Description Our Blemish Patches are formulated with Salicylic Acid and Niacinamide, and designed to target blemishes by absorbing impurities and shielding from external aggressors. Our discreet clear and round patches prevent spot picking from pick-happy hands, which helps reduce skin scarring. Vegan Friendly. Ingredients Polyurethane-11, Sodium Styrene/MA Copolymer, Dimethicone/Vinyl Dimethicone Crosspolymer, Diethylhexyl Adipate, Cellulose Gum, Salicylic Acid, Niacinamide, Sodium Hyaluronate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol. Directions Apply patch to clean, dry blemish. Leave on for up to 8 hours. Remove by carefully peeling away from edges. Apply a new one if necessary. Safety Warning For external use only, do not use on broken or irritated skin. Close pouch after use. Do not flush. See more
